title: Daewoo Stirling Collection, 2 Slice Toaster, Easy Cleaning, Safety Features, Cord Storage, High Lift Lever, Browning Controls, Defrost, Reheat, Cancel Functions, Stainless Steel, White
features: EFFORTLESS MAINTENANCE – The removable crumb tray simplifies cleaning, ensuring your toaster stays in top condition. Additionally, the cord storage feature beneath the toaster keeps your countertop neat and organized, enhancing functionality and tidiness

CUSTOMISABLE – With 7 variable browning controls, you have precise control catering to individual preferences. The high lift lever ensures easy retrieval of even the smallest items, making this toaster ideal for a wide range of bread and pastries

VERSATILE – The defrost function allows you to toast frozen items with ease, while the reheat function ensures your toast is warm and crisp. Additionally, the cancel function provides you with the flexibility to halt toasting to preventing overcooking

STIRLING COLLECTION – Upgrade your kitchens décor with the modern Stirling design that adds style to your countertop. Choose from a range of colours and shop the matching kettle for a cohesive look or mix and match too add personality to your space
3-YEAR WARRANTY FOR PEACE OF MIND – Enjoy 3-year warranty, subject to online registration, ensuring your confidence in the longevity and quality of your Daewoo Stirling Collection Toaster

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎2 Slice, Cord storage, Removable crumb tray, Variable browning controls, Power indicator, Defrost, reheat and cancel functions, Stylish design, Range of colours, Part of a collection
